results.title: Salman Khan's latest appearance at a Mumbai event leaves fans worried
results.description: Salman Khan's latest appearance has ignited discussions among fans concerning his health status. Many fans couldn't help but reminisce about his significant battles with trigeminal neuralgia—a condition that causes excruciating facial pain. He has opened up about the severe pain and difficulties he faced while eating. Fortunately, a gamma knife surgery brought him considerable relief. Nonetheless, he has remained silent about his current health condition.

results.title: ‘I tried doing better than her ex, but she went back to him’ — Tunmise on breakup with Ivana
results.description: TikTok influencer Tunmise has accused his former girlfriend, Ivana, of travelling to Calabar to reunite with her ex-boyfriend despite what he claimed were significant efforts and financial sacrifices to save their relationship. The post ‘I tried doing better than her ex, but she went back to him’ — Tunmise on breakup with Ivana appeared first on Vanguard News .
